commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Needs contributor or maintainer follow-up for live Windows proof and security-sensitive token handoff; this is not a safe automated repair lane because the required proof must come from a real native Windows hydrate set...; Needs attention: The new Windows runner registration path introduces a concrete secret-handling issue by placing the runner registration token in command-line arguments.; Review finding: [P1] Kee... (sha=22194f54ab4808a48afb38a3027b8fac9af97338)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds native Windows fresh-pr checkout/local patch commands, GitHub-runner Actions hydration, Windows env handoff normalization, docs/changelog entries, and AWS coordinator error handling tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings from source inspection: the generated Windows runner command embeds RUNNER_TOKEN in the PowerShell command, and the env importer only normalizes env-file paths. The full native Windows hydrate flow was not reproduced successfully because the linked live run failed before the ready marker.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor or maintainer follow-up for live Windows proof and security-sensitive token handoff; this is not a safe automated repair lane because the required proof must come from a real native Windows hydrate setup.

target.title: fix: support native Windows Crabbox hydration
target.body:
Summary
- support native Windows `--fresh-pr` checkout and local patch apply with PowerShell-safe git commands
- let native Windows use GitHub Actions runner hydration, including scheduled-task runner launch, marker commands, env handoff, and MSYS path normalization
- retry fresh-pr checkout after native Windows SSH port resolution and make AWS coordinator errors/retries clearer

Verification
- `go test ./...`
- `cd worker && npm test -- --run test/aws.test.ts && npm run check && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run build`
- `cd worker && npm run deploy` -> `crabbox-coordinator` version `2e6746fc-a357-447c-a92d-b523f7852891`
- `autoreview --mode local` -> clean, no accepted/actionable findings
- live AWS native Windows: warmed lease `cbx_a7fb1b6848ad` / slug `coral-hermit`, SSH ready on `crabbox@44.201.64.172:2222`
- live Actions runner proof: `actions register --target windows --windows-mode normal --id coral-hermit --repo openclaw/openclaw --name crabbox-coral-hermit-scheduled-smoke --labels crabbox-windows-scheduled-smoke`; GitHub runner `253` came online and idle, then was deleted
- live hydrate proof: OpenClaw run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26486007981 reached the native Windows GitHub runner and completed checkout/setup-node, then failed in OpenClaw's pnpm/corepack workflow step before the hydration marker; lease was released

Follow-up
- fix OpenClaw's Windows hydrate workflow pnpm/corepack setup, then rerun the PR 85597 Windows proof
target.author: steipete
